abstract: Abstract This commentary underscores the common themes that emerged in the papers in this volume. title: A disaggregated DEA framework for sustainable efficiency and performance management in higher education institutions

abstract: Abstract The rapid expansion of generative artificial intelligence (AI) has reshaped higher education, raising urgent pedagogical, ethical, and epistemic questions.
